query:
INSERT INTO product_batches (batchCode, productId, customerId, customRequirements, fobSellingPrice, productionStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 'AC-001-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 'Charcoal gray with higher backrest', 195.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-001-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-001-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2), 'Custom wood finish: espresso instead of dark', 190.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-001-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-001-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3), 'Standard version, premium fabric upgrade', 200.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-001-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-001-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4), 'Bulk order 60+ units, volume discount', 170.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-001-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-002-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5), 'Mustard yellow with lighter shade', 175.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-002-YEL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-002-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6), 'Custom button tufting pattern', 180.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-002-YEL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-002-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 7), 'Bulk order 50+ units, discounted', 150.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-002-YEL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-003-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 8), 'Cream boucle with swivel base upgrade', 310.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-003-CRM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-003-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9), 'Custom dimensions: wider seat (90cm instead of 85cm)', 320.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-003-CRM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-003-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 10), 'Standard version, express production', 295.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-003-CRM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-003-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 11), 'Bulk order 30+ units, volume pricing', 265.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-003-CRM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-003-B005', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 12), 'Custom fabric color: ivory white', 305.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-003-CRM'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-004-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 13), 'Oak frame with darker stain finish', 205.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-004-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-004-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 14), 'Custom rattan weave pattern', 210.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-004-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-004-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 15), 'Standard version, premium linen cushions', 200.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-004-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-004-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 16), 'Bulk order 70+ units, discounted rate', 180.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-004-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-005-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 17), 'Emerald green velvet with deeper color', 240.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-005-EMR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-005-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 18), 'Custom brass leg finish: antique brass', 235.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-005-EMR'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AC-005-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 19), 'Bulk order 40+ units, volume discount', 210.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'AC-005-EMR';
